mapper.select:
WITH stock_move AS ( /* 입고 */ SELECT i.item_cd ,i.test_no ,m.tran_date ,m.src_storage_cd AS storage_cd ,i.qty AS qty FROM tb_inv_tran_item i JOIN tb_inv_tran_mst m ON i.tran_id = m.tran_id WHERE i.item_cd = #{itemCd} AND m.tran_status = 'C' AND m.src_storage_cd IS NOT NULL AND m.tran_type_cd IN ('A','B','C','I', 'J') UNION ALL /* 출고 */ SELECT i.item_cd ,i.test_no ,m.tran_date ,CASE WHEN m.tran_type_cd IN ('I','J') THEN m.tar_storage_cd ELSE m.src_storage_cd END AS storage_cd ,i.qty * -1 AS qty FROM tb_inv_tran_item i JOIN tb_inv_tran_mst m ON i.tran_id = m.tran_id WHERE i.item_cd = #{itemCd} AND m.tran_status = 'C' AND m.tar_storage_cd IS NOT NULL AND m.tran_type_cd IN ('D','E','F','L','Q','T','I', 'J') UNION ALL /* 조정 */ SELECT i.item_cd ,i.test_no ,m.tran_date ,m.src_storage_cd AS storage_cd ,i.qty AS qty FROM tb_inv_tran_item i JOIN tb_inv_tran_mst m ON i.tran_id = m.tran_id WHERE i.item_cd = #{itemCd} AND m.tran_status = 'C' AND m.src_storage_cd IS NOT NULL AND m.tran_type_cd IN ('P', 'R', 'S', 'U', 'V', 'W', 'X') ), base AS ( SELECT sm.item_cd ,sm.test_no ,sm.storage_cd ,SUM(sm.qty) AS qty FROM stock_move sm JOIN tb_storage_mst s ON sm.storage_cd = s.storage_cd WHERE s.area_cd = #{areaCd} AND ISNULL(s.use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' GROUP BY sm.item_cd, sm.test_no, sm.storage_cd ), in_date AS ( SELECT i.item_cd ,i.test_no ,MIN(m.tran_date) AS in_date FROM tb_inv_tran_item i JOIN tb_inv_tran_mst m ON i.tran_id = m.tran_id WHERE i.item_cd = #{itemCd} AND m.tran_status = 'C' AND m.src_storage_cd IS NOT NULL GROUP BY i.item_cd, i.test_no ) SELECT b.item_cd AS itemCd ,b.test_no AS testNo ,d.in_date AS inDate ,(select expiry_date from tb_item_test_no where test_no = b.test_no) as expiryDate ,
SUM(CASE WHEN b.storage_cd = #{storageCd} THEN b.qty ELSE 0 END) AS [${storageCd}]
,
SUM(CASE WHEN b.storage_cd = #{storageCd} THEN b.qty ELSE 0 END) AS totQty
FROM base b LEFT JOIN in_date d ON b.item_cd = d.item_cd AND ISNULL(b.test_no, '') = ISNULL(d.test_no, '') GROUP BY b.item_cd, b.test_no, d.in_date HAVING
SUM(CASE WHEN b.storage_cd = #{storageCd} THEN b.qty ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY b.test_no
mapper.insert: insert into tb_move_req (move_req_date, seq, area_cd, src_storage_cd, tar_storage_cd, manager_id, move_status, etc, reg_id, upd_id) values (#{moveReqDate}, #{seq}, #{areaCd}, #{srcStorageCd}, #{tarStorageCd}, #{managerId}, 'Q', #{etc}, #{userId}, #{userId})
insert into tb_move_req_item (move_req_id, po_no, item_cd, etc, qty, reg_id, upd_id) values (#{moveReqId}, #{poNo}, #{itemCd}, #{etc}, #{qty},#{userId}, #{userId})
INSERT INTO tb_move_item ( move_req_id, item_type_cd, item_cd, test_no, qty, etc, reg_id, upd_id) VALUES (#{moveReqId}, #{itemTypeCd}, #{itemCd}, #{testNo}, #{qty}, #{etc}, #{userId}, #{userId} )
